description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa upholstered in a rich, deep red material that appears to be leather or faux leather. The sofa features two large, plush seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, both of which are slightly overstuffed for comfort. The armrests are broad, straight, and padded, extending to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, modern silhouette. The back of the sofa is flat and unadorned, with a smooth surface that matches the rest of the upholstery. The legs are not visible, suggesting they are either recessed or the sofa sits low to the ground. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or residential living spaces.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater red leather sofa with plush seat and back cushions, broad padded armrests, and a smooth, unadorned exterior. The design is simple and functional, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the broad, padded armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the flat, smooth backrest and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the matching armrest and the uniformity of the cushions.
description_view_3: Front view revealing the two large seat cushions, two backrest cushions, and the inviting seating area.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose backrest cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight, and padded armrests at each end, extending to the same height as the backrest with a boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a recessed or hidden leg design, possibly block-style or low-profile feet.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with two large, loose cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid red color with a smooth, untextured leather or faux leather finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
